Package de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.originlabels

Class OriginTermLabelsExt

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.originlabels.OriginTermLabelsExt
All Implemented Interfaces:
KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.TermInfo, KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip
public class OriginTermLabelsExt extends Object implements KeYGuiExtension, KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu, KeYGuiExtension.Tooltip, KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu, KeYGuiExtension.TermInfo
Extension adapter for OriginTermLabels and OriginTermLabelVisualizers.

  • Method Details

    • getMainMenuActions

      public List<Action> getMainMenuActions(MainWindow mainWindow)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getMainMenuActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.MainMenu
      Parameters:
      mainWindow - the window of the main menu
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction

    • getContextActions

      public List<Action> getContextActions(KeYMediator mediator, ContextMenuKind kind, Object underlyingObject)
      Description copied from interface: KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      A list of actions which should be added to the main menu.

      Actions should use the KeyAction.PATH and KeyAction.PRIORITY to control their position in the menu.

      Specified by:
      getContextActions in interface KeYGuiExtension.ContextMenu
      Parameters:
      mediator - the window of the main menu
      kind - the type of context menu
      underlyingObject - the object for which the context menu is requested
      Returns:
      non-null, emptiable list of actions.
      See Also:
      • KeyAction
